news.title: Doom soundtrack composer Bobby Prince dies aged 81
news.titleEN: Doom soundtrack composer Bobby Prince dies aged 81

news.title: Battlefield 6's next update is bringing back a classic mechanic… from Call of Duty: Ghosts
news.titleEN: Battlefield 6's next update is bringing back a classic mechanic… from Call of Duty: Ghosts
